member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations
member.summary: This class contains methods which perform operations on bin numbers needed to execute the main binning algorithms.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.GetHardBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the hardbin digits from a given 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the hardbin from.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.GetFunctionalBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the Functional Bin digits from a given 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the fbin from.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.GetLastTwoDigitsOfFunctionalBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the last two digits of the Functional Bin from a 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the last two digits of the fbin from.
member.returns: The last two digits of the fbin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.IsBinFailBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Determines whether a given bin is a failing bin. If the Hardbin is equal to or greater than 7 it is a fail bin, otherwise it is a pass bin.
member.param: The bin to check for failing criteria.
member.returns: True if the bin is a fail bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.GetHardbinFromFbin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the hardbin digits from a 4-digit functional Bin.
member.param: The functional bin from which to calculate the hardbin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.CalculateDbinFromFbin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Calculates an 8-digit Dbin from the fBin.
member.param: The fBin from which to calculate the fail bin from.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.CorrectBinForBin26(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Corrects a bin number to account for condition WASBIN26 == true.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.ValidateNumberOfDigits(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Validates that a bin number has between 7 to 8 digits.
member.param: The bin number to get the number of digits from.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SortBinning.BinOperations.GetNumberOfDigits(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the number of digits in a bin number or a bin exclusion.
member.param: The bin number from which to get the number of digits.
member.returns: The number of digits in the bin number.
